_comment: Multimedia registry (Release 1.2). NOTHING here is fabricated or auto-published. Every item is a DRAFT until 'status' is 'approved'. Accessibility is REQUIRED: video and audio need a 'transcript' (link or path) or they will not render; images need alt text. Privacy: prefer self-hosted files under assets/media/ or downloads/, or a privacy-preserving official link — never a third-party tracking embed. To add media: place the real file (or official link), add an approved entry here, and rebuild. The example below has status 'draft' and is ignored.

items.title: (example) Replace with a real talk recording
items.description: Template entry so the schema is clear. Delete it and add real media. For a video/audio item, a transcript is mandatory; set status to 'approved' only after a human has reviewed it.
